name: HITRUST Common Security Framework
description: HITRUST CSF v11.3.0 is a certifiable, scalable security and privacy controls framework consolidating HIPAA, ISO 27001, NIST SP 800-53, PCI DSS, GDPR, and other standards. Widely adopted in healthcare and increasingly in adjacent regulated industries. HITRUST CSF Certification is a recognized form of compliance attestation.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud service providers serving healthcare or HIPAA-covered customers commonly pursue HITRUST CSF Certification. Maps to many cloud-relevant control sets.
relationToAISecurity: HITRUST published HITRUST AI Security Assessment in 2024; HITRUST CSF v11+ began incorporating AI-related controls. Use HITRUST AI Security Assessment for current AI-specific evaluations.

license.notes: HITRUST CSF is proprietary; access requires a HITRUST license. Repository holds metadata-only stub for SecID discovery; full content stays under license.

current_extraction.notes: Marker-extracted from HITRUST-published material. extract_hitrust_csf.py parses the marker markdown into 150 Control References across 13 Control Categories (00-13, with 04.0 not having leaf controls in this version). Repository holds the extraction artifacts only; full CSF requires a HITRUST license.

notes: Proprietary framework — confirm license terms before redistributing extracted content.
